notes: Ported from the original Cashiro PrimeCommercialBankParser.kt (parser-core/src/main/kotlin/com/ritesh/parser/core/bank/PrimeCommercialBankParser.kt). Prime Commercial Bank (Nepal) SMS format: "Dear NAME, NPR 1,234.50 is withdrawn from A/C XXX#1234 on 01/01/2026 05:55. Rmk: 9812345678. Good Baln: NPR 321.45" The Kotlin parser uses the date-time after "on" as the reference, the "Rmk:" value as the merchant, and the 4 digits after "#" as the account last-4.

fixtures.name: debit transaction - withdrawn with phone remark
fixtures.body: Dear FOO, NPR 1,234.50 is withdrawn from A/C XXX#1234 on 01/01/2026 05:55. Rmk: 9812345678. Good Baln: NPR 321.45

fixtures.name: credit transaction - deposited with text remark
fixtures.body: Dear FOO, NPR 9,876.00 is deposited in A/C XXX#5678 on 01/01/2026 05:55. Rmk: CASHDEP. Good Baln: NPR 54321.123.

fixtures.name: dlt-style sender with hyphens still dispatches
fixtures.body: Dear FOO, NPR 500.00 is deposited in A/C XXX#9012 on 15/02/2026 10:30. Rmk: SALARY. Good Baln: NPR 12500.00

fixtures.name: otp message without movement keyword is filter-rejected
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, your OTP for Prime Commercial Bank login is 123456. Do not share it with anyone.
